title: Mildly Spicy Uruguayan Chicken Skewers
description: A solo dinner dish featuring the unique flavors of Uruguay, with a hint of spice and a touch of coconut cream, this recipe is perfect for a low-fat friendly meal. The combination of cloves and coconut cream gives it a rich and cultured taste.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together coconut cream, olive oil, lime juice, garlic, smoked paprika, salt, black pepper, and ground cloves.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through.
Let the skewers rest for 2 minutes before serving.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
Serve with your choice of sides, such as rice or roasted vegetables.
